examples: One can be Malthusian about this.
There doesn't seem to be much danger of a Malthusian catastrophe.
This will not by itself dissolve Malthusian worries about the pressure of population on the world's resources.
That is, everywhere and always I predict Malthusian stagnation because deviations are not evolutionarily stable.
After decades of Malthusian doom-mongering, how have we found ourselves in a position of such abundance?
